## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding session between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and Matthew Panzarino (GrowthX) to discuss company strategy, processes, and Matthew's role.](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's core offering: AI-powered content creation with human oversight, positioned as a cost-effective alternative to traditional in-house content teams](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Current focus on scaling the bottom layer of talent (e.g., international writers/editors) to increase value delivery to clients](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Plans to develop more specialized content offerings (e.g., technical writers) and expand into enterprise/Fortune 2000 market](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating efficient workflows and processes to maximize productivity and quality](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Business Model and Origin

  - [Started as AI workflow creation + outsourced talent (e.g., "Kavishka" model)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
  - [Evolved into full-service content creation with AI + human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
  - [Positioned as alternative to expensive in-house marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
  - [Typical client spend: $9,000-$18,000/month, 90-day pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
  - [Current client base: \~45 clients, aiming for 120 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Use AI for initial content generation and research](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Human editors/writers refine and fact-check](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating high-quality "seeds" (content pieces) efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Focus on iterative improvement and nurturing successful content](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Team Structure and Scaling

  - [Leadership: Marcel (CEO), Jason (Head of Go-to-Market), Kyle (Account Management), Matthew (Editorial Strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Looking to scale "bottom layer" of talent (e.g., international writers/editors)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Considering "task hub" or marketplace model for certain roles](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Need for specialized talent (e.g., technical writers) based on client demands](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

### Client Onboarding and Management

  - [Quick sales process (often 1-2 30-minute meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Extensive onboarding documentation and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Use of AI-generated research and strategy documents](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Regular check-ins and strategy calibration](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### Future Plans and Challenges

  - [Developing more specialized content offerings (e.g., technical content)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Expanding into enterprise/Fortune 2000 market](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Creating efficient processes for scaling (e.g., onboarding, quality control)](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Balancing generalist vs. specialist roles in the organization](https://fathom.video/share/ytV1LF59RojNCALQyF4zCrvTmwd-FYyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Next Steps

  - Matthew to review all documentation in Notion and other platforms
  - Schedule follow-up strategy session to discuss scaling plans (120+ clients)
  - Develop plan for hiring/cultivating specialized talent (e.g., technical writers)
  - Create resource outlining traditional publishing team structure as sales tool
  - Matthew to connect with key team members (Kyle, Jason, etc.) for deeper context
